name: adr-0054-r7-r8-wiring-shared-seam
description: ADR-0054 R7/R8 wiring: dead 'plumbing' functions get real callers via a SINGLE shared seam. buildWikiContext routes through core/instructions.generateWikiContext (the one caller all 4 wiki-injecting adapters already use; inject_on_apply gate + settings.wiki.task derivation enforced there, controller stays I/O-free per ADR-0040). sessions.ts enumerateSessions/loadEnumeratedSession route through a shared sweepSessions helper in commands/wiki.ts used by both ingest+harvest (dedup of the old per-command listAdapters loop). Test-only AdapterSource/LlmExtractor seams (mirroring controller __setAdapterResolverForTests) avoid Bun's process-global mock.module leak. After wiring, grep for callers to prove non-plumbing.
